document.name: Play Area Association
document.description: The Play Area Association is a volunteer social organization for more than 250 member families in Manhattan’s East 70s area. Its official site says the group provides weekly playgroups for toddlers, year-round Play-and-Learn co-op classes for children 18 months through 4 years, field trips, parties, and shared indoor and outdoor play spaces at Payson House.
